title: sida rhombifolia var. insularis
intro: Sida rhombifolia var. insularis, also known as the island sida or insular sida, is a variant of the Sida rhombifolia plant species, which belongs to the Malvaceae family of flowering plants. The medicinal properties of Sida rhombifolia var. insularis include its antidiabetic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including the reduction of blood sugar levels, improvement of kidney function, and relief from symptoms of diabetes and other inflammatory diseases. Herbal preparations of Sida rhombifolia var. insularis can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
